content: Just as the language-learning sense of reflexion (reflection) builds better long-term vocabulary retention by having learners actively review their own writing errors, autonomous AI agents can incorporate structured language-focused reflection routines to correct persistent hallucination and logical inference flaws. This frames self-reflection not just as a memory editing tool, but as a language fluency-training exercise for AI, similar to how human students refine their communication skills through deliberate self-review.
